_comment: CAMM locale catalog — English baseline. Tokens like __DISPLAY_NAME__ are replaced from CammHost.Manifest at lookup time; see Strings.cs for the full substitution table. Translators: copy this file to lang/<culture>.json next to the consuming launcher exe and translate values. Do NOT translate the keys or the substitution tokens. Keys ending in '.InstallerOnly' are auto-selected when CammHost.Manifest.IsInstallerOnly is true; only add the variant where the base key's copy is wrong for installer-only mode.
Console.Title: __DISPLAY_NAME__ Launcher
Wizard.Welcome.Title: Welcome
Wizard.Welcome.Heading: Install __DISPLAY_NAME__
Wizard.Welcome.Body:
This installer will copy the launcher to Program Files and register __DISPLAY_NAME__ with Windows.

Windows will prompt for administrator permission later in this installer.
Wizard.Welcome.Body.InstallerOnly:
This installer will copy the updater to Program Files, deploy __DISPLAY_NAME__'s files to __TARGET_GAME__'s mod folder, and register __DISPLAY_NAME__ with Windows so updates can be applied automatically.

Windows will prompt for administrator permission later in this installer.
Wizard.Channel.Title: Update channel
Wizard.Channel.Heading: Update channel
Wizard.Channel.Label: &Update channel:
Wizard.Channel.Stable.Description: Tested releases only. Safest; gets new features after they've been validated.
Wizard.Channel.Latest.Description: Includes pre-release builds. Newer features but may be rougher. Good for testers.
Wizard.Channel.Off.Description: Never check for updates. You will miss bug fixes and new screen support.
Wizard.Ready.Title: Ready to install
Wizard.Ready.Heading: Ready to install
Wizard.Ready.Note: Clicking Install will prompt for administrator permission. You can change the update channel later from Windows Settings → Apps → Installed Apps → __DISPLAY_NAME__ → Modify, or by re-running this installer.
Wizard.Installing.Title: Installing
Wizard.Installing.Heading: Installing...
Wizard.Installing.SaveChannelFailNote: Non-fatal: install proceeds with prior channel setting.
Wizard.Installing.UacDeclined: Install cancelled — administrator permission was not granted.
Wizard.Done.SuccessBody:
__DISPLAY_NAME__ is installed.

Launch __TARGET_GAME__ from __TARGET_LAUNCHER__ — the accessibility mod activates automatically.

Per-user settings live at %LocalAppData%\__LOCAL_APP_DATA_FOLDER__\launcher.ini.
Wizard.Done.FailureBodyPrefix:
The installer could not complete.

Reason:
Wizard.Done.FailureBodySuffix: Nothing has been changed permanently. You can close this window and run the installer again to retry.
Wizard.CancelConfirm.Title: Cancel installation?
Wizard.CancelConfirm.Instruction: Are you sure you want to cancel?
Wizard.CancelConfirm.Content: Nothing has been installed yet. You can come back to the installer any time.
Wizard.CancelConfirm.Continue.Heading: Continue installing
Wizard.CancelConfirm.Cancel.Heading: Yes, cancel and exit
Wizard.CancelConfirm.Cancel.Note: Close the installer without making any changes.
ChannelPicker.Title: __DISPLAY_NAME__ — Update Channel
ChannelPicker.Stable.Heading: Stable (recommended)
ChannelPicker.Stable.Note: Tested releases only. Safest, gets new features after they've been validated.
ChannelPicker.Latest.Heading: Latest
ChannelPicker.Latest.Note: Includes pre-release builds. Newer features but may be rougher. Good for testers.
ChannelPicker.Off.Heading: Off (not recommended)
ChannelPicker.Off.Note: Never check for updates. You will miss bug fixes and new screen support.
Installer.Uninstall.ConfirmContent:
This will:
  • Remove the __TARGET_LAUNCHER__-launch redirect (__TARGET_GAME__ will launch directly again)
  • Remove the __DISPLAY_NAME__ mod from __TARGET_GAME__'s mod folder
  • Remove the Apps & Features registration
  • Leave installed files at __INSTALL_DIR__ in place
    (delete that folder manually if you want a complete cleanup)

Clicking Uninstall will prompt for administrator permission (Windows UAC).
Installer.Uninstall.ConfirmContent.Insta:
This will:
  • Remove the __DISPLAY_NAME__ mod files from __TARGET_GAME__'s mod folder
  • Remove the Apps & Features registration
  • Leave installed files at __INSTALL_DIR__ in place
    (delete that folder manually if you want a complete cleanup)

Clicking Uninstall will prompt for administrator permission (Windows UAC).
Installer.Uninstall.ConfirmButton.Note: Remove the redirect, mod files, and Apps & Features entry.
Installer.Uninstall.CancelButton.Heading: Cancel
Installer.Uninstall.CompleteBody:
__DISPLAY_NAME__ has been uninstalled.

__TARGET_GAME__ will now launch directly from __TARGET_LAUNCHER__ again — the access mod will not activate.

Cleaned up:
  • __TARGET_LAUNCHER__ launch redirect (IFEO)
  • Apps & Features registration
  • Mod files in __TARGET_GAME__'s mod folder
Installer.Uninstall.CompleteBody.Install:
__DISPLAY_NAME__ has been uninstalled.

The accessibility mod will no longer activate inside __TARGET_GAME__.

Cleaned up:
  • Apps & Features registration
  • Mod files in __TARGET_GAME__'s mod folder
AlreadyInstalled.Title: __DISPLAY_NAME__ — Already Installed
AlreadyInstalled.Instruction: __DISPLAY_NAME__ is already installed. What would you like to do?
AlreadyInstalled.Reinstall.Heading: Reinstall / update
AlreadyInstalled.Reinstall.Note: Overwrite existing files with this version. Prompts for administrator permission (UAC).
AlreadyInstalled.Uninstall.Heading: Uninstall __DISPLAY_NAME__
AlreadyInstalled.Uninstall.Note: Remove __DISPLAY_NAME__ from this computer. Prompts for administrator permission (UAC).
AlreadyInstalled.Settings.Heading: Change update channel only
AlreadyInstalled.Settings.Note: Open the update channel picker without reinstalling. No UAC needed.
AlreadyInstalled.Exit.Heading: Exit
Settings.SavedBodySuffix: Click OK to finish. The new setting takes effect on the next launch of __TARGET_GAME__ through the access mod.
Settings.SavedFromAlreadyInstalledBodySu: The new setting takes effect next time __TARGET_GAME__ launches.
Speech.InstallStarting: __DISPLAY_NAME__ is not installed. Starting install. Click Yes on the User Account Control prompt to continue.
Speech.LauncherStagedSuffix: staged. It will take effect next launch.
Speech.GameNotFound: Could not find __TARGET_GAME__ at the expected location. If __TARGET_LAUNCHER__ is installed somewhere non-default, run the launcher via __TARGET_LAUNCHER__'s Play button (the IFEO redirect will pass the right path).
Speech.ForegroundFailed: Could not focus __TARGET_GAME__. Press Alt+Tab to switch to the game window.
Speech.AnotherLauncherRunning: Another __DISPLAY_NAME__ launcher is already running. Close it first, then try again.
Dependency.Prompt.Title: __DISPLAY_NAME__ — Required component
Dependency.Prompt.Content: Download __DEPENDENCY_DISPLAY_NAME__ from GitHub and install it now? You only need to do this once.
Dependency.Prompt.InstallButton.Heading: Install __DEPENDENCY_DISPLAY_NAME__
Dependency.Prompt.SkipButton.Heading: Skip — I'll install it manually
Dependency.Prompt.SkipButton.Note: __DISPLAY_NAME__ may not function until __DEPENDENCY_DISPLAY_NAME__ is installed separately.
Dependency.Prompt.CancelButton.Heading: Cancel install
Dependency.Skipped: __DEPENDENCY_DISPLAY_NAME__ was skipped. __DISPLAY_NAME__ may not function until it is installed separately.
Dependency.DownloadFailed.Title: __DEPENDENCY_DISPLAY_NAME__ download failed
